channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: The Jewish Labour Bund: A Radical Socialist Movement in Europe
item.description: Molly Crabapple’s new book, 'Here Where We Live Is Our Country: The Story of the Jewish Bund', chronicles the history of the Jewish Labour Bund, a socialist movement founded in 1897 in the Tsarist emp...

item.title: West Bengal's Voter List Faces Major Shrinkage, 27 Lakh Excluded Ahead of Assembly Elections
item.description: West Bengal’s Special Intensive Revision (SIR) has led to a significant reduction in its electorate. As of April 7, 2026, 27 lakh voters have been excluded after judicial scrutiny, resulting in a 12% ...

item.title: Martin Scorsese's Silence: An Epic Exploration of Faith, Doubt and Persecution in Feudal Japan
item.description: Martin Scorsese's Silence, released in 2016 after nearly three decades in development, is a profound period drama set in 1640s Japan. The film follows Jesuit missionaries Sebastião Rodrigues (Andrew G...

item.title: Onvango & Taurus to Auction 29 Vehicles Across Kenya from KSh 156,000 to 1.45 Million
item.description: Nairobi-based law firm Onvango & Taurus is organising a private treaty auction of 29 vehicles, with bidding closing on April 15, 2026. The auction includes a wide range of vehicles, from economical ca...

item.title: Arcee Launches Trinity: A New Open-Source AI Model Challenging Chinese Dominance
item.description: A small U.S. startup called Arcee, comprised of just 26 people, has released a new open-source AI model called Trinity Large Thinking. Built on a $20 million budget, Trinity aims to provide U.S. and W...

item.title: PAGASA warns Butuan and Cotabato of extreme heat conditions this Wednesday
item.description: According to the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical and Astronomical Services Administration (PAGASA), residents of Butuan and Cotabato are expected to experience dangerously high heat index levels t...

item.title: Arsenal claim narrow win over Sporting with late Havertz strike
item.description: Arsenal secured a dramatic 1-0 victory over Sporting Lisbon in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final, thanks to a stoppage-time goal from Kai Havertz. The win provided relief for manag...

item.title: Artemis II Mission: Astronauts Complete Historic Lunar Flyby and Inspire Global Unity
item.description: The Artemis II mission, launched on April 1, 2026, has successfully sent four astronauts—NASA's Christina Koch, Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, and Canadian Space Agency's Jeremy Hansen—on a 10-day journ...

item.title: Alphonse Makokha Shows How Kamulu Has Developed Over the Years
item.description: Alphonse Makokha, the former comedian from the popular Kenyan TV show Vioja Mahakamani, has given fans a glimpse of how his Kamulu neighbourhood has transformed over time. In a clip shared online by j...

item.title: Montreal Community Mourns Migrant’s Death, Calls for Better Support for Unhoused Individuals
item.description: Community members in Montreal are expressing deep concern following the death of an unhoused migrant, which many workers believe could have been prevented. The migrant was found deceased in a local ne...

item.title: North Korea conducts missile launches amid ongoing tensions with South Korea
item.description: On 8th April 2026, North Korea reportedly fired an unidentified projectile into the sea off its east coast, marking another episode in the ongoing tensions with South Korea. This followed a previous l...

item.title: Bayern Munich secure 2-1 away win over Real Madrid in Champions League quarter-final first leg
item.description: Na the UEFA Champions League quarter-final first leg wey take place for Santiago Bernabeu Stadium for Madrid on Tuesday, April 7, 2026. Bayern Munich from Germany defeat Real Madrid 2-1 for one very i...

item.title: British Teenager Dies in Vietnam After Motorbike Crash
item.description: Orla Wates, a 19-year-old British woman, tragically passed away following a motorbike accident in Vietnam. The incident occurred on the Ha Giang Loop, a popular road trip destination in northern Vietn...

item.title: KU Graduate Faces Unemployment and Eviction After Viral Graduation Dance
item.description: James Okello, a recent Kenyatta University graduate in Environmental Services Resource Management, gained viral attention for dancing to a song celebrating the late ODM leader Raila Odinga during his ...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte Seeks Clarification on Constitutionality of Impeachment Proceedings
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte’s legal team clarified that their petition to the Supreme Court to halt impeachment proceedings in the House of Representatives is not an attempt to evade the process. File...

item.title: RBNZ keeps cash rate at 2.25% amid concerns over rising fuel costs and economic slowdown
item.description: The Reserve Bank of New Zealand (RBNZ) has opted to leave the official cash rate unchanged at 2.25 per cent, even though the country’s inflation sits slightly above its target at 3.1 per cent. The cen...

item.title: Artemis II astronauts report emotional experiences and scientific observations during lunar flyby
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II astronauts, comprising Christina Koch, Victor Glover, Wiseman, and Canadian astronaut Jeremy Hansen, have shared their profound emotional reactions while flying past the Moon. The cr...

item.title: Kerala, Puducherry and Assam Assembly Polls: Campaigning Ends, Voting Scheduled on April 9
item.description: The final day of campaigning for the Kerala, Puducherry, and Assam Assembly elections concluded on April 7, 2026, marking the start of the mandatory 48-hour silence period before polling. Voting for 1...

item.title: Volunteers Play Key Role in Zambales Marine Turtle Conservation
item.description: The conservation of marine turtles, locally known as 'pawikan', in Zambales is heavily supported by local volunteers from various sectors including government units, tourism establishments, and corpor...

item.title: Kaizer Chiefs, AmaZulu, Sekhukhune United and Durban City battle for third spot in Betway Premiership
item.description: The Betway Premiership title race is mainly between Mamelodi Sundowns and Orlando Pirates, but a tight battle is unfolding for the crucial third position, which qualifies a team for the CAF Confederat...
